title: 'Achiymelek #0288
definition:
Ahimelech = "my brother is king" or "brother of Melek"

 1) a priest murdered by Doeg at Saul's command, for supposedly
    assisting David
 2) a Hittite warrior under David
nasbUsage:
Definition: Ahimelech = "my brother is king" or "brother of Melek"

 1) a priest murdered by Doeg at Saul's command, for supposedly
    assisting David
 2) a Hittite warrior under David

    NASB:  brother of a king, an Isr. name, also a Hittite name
